_comment: Proof-of-possession JWT (DPoP-style, RFC 9449). Sent alongside the ACT to prove the agent holds the private key.

_fields.ath: SHA-256 hash of the ACT. Binds this proof to a specific token.
_fields.htu: Target URL. Prevents proof reuse against different endpoints.
_fields.htb: SHA-256 hash of the request body. Required for POST/PUT/PATCH. Prevents body swapping.
_fields.iat: When the proof was created. Verifier rejects if older than 60 seconds.
_fields.jti: Unique nonce. Verifier maintains a short-lived replay cache to reject duplicates.

_http_example.request:
POST /gmail/send HTTP/1.1
Host: gateway.x401.dev
Authorization: ACT eyJhbGciOiJFZERTQSIs...
X-X401-Proof: eyJ0eXAiOiJhY3QtcG9wK2p3dCIs...
